title: Intel Tool — Audio Alert Bug Fix
description: Audio alerts do not fire when intel is reported within 5 jumps in live use, despite working correctly in isolated tests.
notes: Works in test environment — likely a timing or state-sync issue in production flow
Investigate alert trigger path when intel arrives through the live parser

title: Persistent ESI Sessions
description: Keep characters logged in across app restarts by persisting and auto-refreshing ESI refresh tokens.
notes: Store refresh token securely (electron-store / keychain, not localStorage)
Silent re-auth on launch using refresh token before expiry
Surface re-login prompt only when refresh token is revoked or expired

title: Multi-Account ESI Login
description: Support adding and switching between multiple EVE characters/accounts, each with their own ESI auth token.
notes: Store tokens per character — keyed by character ID
Account switcher UI in header or sidebar
Scope sets may differ per character — handle gracefully

title: Auto-Detect Player Location
description: Automatically pull the pilot's current system from ESI so the Intel tool can calculate jump range without manual input.
notes: ESI scope: esi-location.read_location.v1
Poll or use a refresh trigger to keep location current

title: RIFT Intel Integration
description: Pull live intel data from RIFT into Aurora — hostile activity, system status, and threat assessments visible alongside other panels.
notes: Requires RIFT API key / feed configuration
Display in dedicated Intel panel or overlay on existing views

title: Aurora's Voice — ElevenLabs Integration
description: Give Aurora a voice using ElevenLabs TTS. Select a voice that fits Aurora's character, wire it into alert and notification events.
notes: Audition ElevenLabs voice library — open to suggestions for best fit
Start with Intel alerts, expand to other spoken notifications
ElevenLabs API key required; consider streaming vs. pre-generated clips

title: Aurora × Claude Code — Self-Modifying Agent
description: Explore giving Aurora access to her own codebase via the Claude Code SDK so she can read, reason about, and potentially modify herself.
notes: Claude Code SDK / agent loop would need to be embedded or sidecar'd
Significant safety and scope concerns — sandboxing required
Likely a research spike first: can Aurora answer "how do you work?" accurately?
Probably unlikely in full form — log as aspirational / long-term exploration

title: Wallet & Transaction History
description: Full wallet journal and transaction history pulled from ESI. Filter by type, date range, and counterparty.
notes: ESI scopes: esi-wallet.read_character_wallet.v1
Chart ISK flow over time
Export to CSV

title: Alliance Freight Calculator
description: Calculate freight costs for alliance logistics routes. Input items/volume, select route, get collateral and cost breakdown.
notes: Alliance contract rates and route configuration
Integration with item appraisal for collateral auto-calc

title: Contract Browsing
description: Browse and search personal, corporation, and public contracts. Filter by type, location, and status.
notes: ESI scopes: esi-contracts.read_character_contracts.v1
Scope of public contract search TBD

title: Fitting Simulator
description: Build and evaluate ship fittings inline. Apply pilot skill modifiers, calculate DPS, tank, and capacitor values.
notes: Significant scope — may integrate with Pyfa API or similar
Requires full static data export (SDE) for attributes

title: Settings Cog Menu — Standalone Version
description: Add a settings/cog icon at the top of the interface (next to minimize button) for user-configurable options. Initial focus is microphone device selection, previously supported via Chrome APIs, but the menu should be extensible for future settings.
notes: Microphone device selector — enumerate available input devices via MediaDevices.enumerateDevices() and allow user to pick
Cog icon positioned in top bar next to minimize button
Menu should be extensible for future adjustable options (voice sensitivity, TTS voice, theme, etc.)
Chrome previously supported mic selection natively — replicate this in the standalone UI
Persist selected device across sessions (localStorage or config file)

title: Region Search on Map
description: Add a search feature to the Aurora map allowing pilots to search for and navigate to specific regions by name. Should highlight or focus the map view on the matched region.
notes: Search input field on the map UI
Match against region names (and optionally constellation/system names)
Pan/zoom map to centre on matched region
Highlight matched region visually

title: Alpha Tester Feedback Tool
description: In-app feedback submission tool for alpha testers to report bugs, suggest improvements, and rate their experience without leaving the Aurora interface.
notes: Simple form or floating button accessible at all times
Fields: category (bug/suggestion/other), description, optional screenshot
Submissions routed to dev dashboard or issue tracker
Optional: tester identity/API key attached automatically for context

title: Private Ship Fitting File Sharing
description: Allow pilots to share ship fittings privately via generated links. Recipients can view the fitting without needing an account or API key.
notes: Link-based sharing — generate a unique URL per fitting
Links can be set to public or private (unlisted)
Expiry options under consideration
Format support (EFT/ESI) under consideration
ACL/per-user access control under consideration

title: Character / Corporation Lookup
description: Allow Aurora to look up EVE pilot profiles including corporation, alliance, security status, and standings by character name. Useful for real-time intel validation during hostile contact reports.
notes: Query by character name or ID
Return corp, alliance, security status, and standings
Cross-reference with pilot's own standings for blue/red/neutral flag
Useful for intel callouts and contact verification
ESI supports this natively — no auth required for basic affiliation data

Key endpoints: /characters/{character_id}/ (name, corp, alliance, sec status), /characters/affiliation/ (bulk lookup up to 1000 IDs — best for real-time intel), /corporations/{corporation_id}/ (corp name, ticker, alliance, member count, CEO), /alliances/{alliance_id}/ (alliance name, ticker, executor corp), /characters/search/ (name string → character ID)
Bulk affiliation endpoint is the optimal path for live intel drops

title: Appraisal Panel — Arcade Graph Scoped to Selected Items
description: Adjust the appraisal panel so that the arcade/price graphs only display data for the items currently selected by the user, rather than rendering graphs for every item in the appraisal list. This improves clarity and reduces visual noise when working with large appraisals.

title: Planetary Industry Panel
description: Add a dedicated Planetary Industry panel to Aurora, providing visibility into PI colonies, extraction cycles, production chains, and planetary commodity management.

title: Loot Appraisal Tool
description: A dedicated tool for appraising loot drops, allowing pilots to quickly assess the value of salvage, drops, and collected items in bulk.

title: Character Lookup & Kill/Loss Report Panel
description: A panel for looking up EVE Online characters displaying corporation, alliance, security status, and standings. Integrated kill and loss report functionality pulls zKillboard data for the pilot, any looked-up character, or corporation — showing recent kills, losses, ship types destroyed, and ISK efficiency.
notes: Query by character name or ID
Return corp, alliance, security status, and standings
Cross-reference with pilot's own standings for blue/red/neutral flag
Integrate zKillboard API for kill/loss history per character or corp
Display recent kills, losses, ship types, ISK destroyed/lost, and efficiency rating
Useful for intel callouts — quickly assess if a contact is a known PvPer
ESI endpoints: /characters/{id}/, /characters/affiliation/, /corporations/{id}/, /alliances/{id}/
zKillboard API: /api/kills/characterID/{id}/ and /api/losses/characterID/{id}/

title: Fleet Composition Tool
description: Pull live fleet data from ESI to display current fleet members, ship types, wing/squad assignments, and roles. Designed primarily for FCs — requires fleet boss status for full member visibility. Line members see a limited view confirming fleet membership only.
notes: ESI scope: esi-fleets.read_fleet.v1
Fleet boss required for full member list — detect on load and adjust view accordingly
Resolve ship type IDs and character names via ESI for display
Show wing/squad structure, roles (FC, WC, SC, member), and current system per member
Line member fallback view: confirm fleet membership, show own role only
Potential extension: ship role classifier (DPS/logi/ewar/tackle) based on ship type

title: Wallet Goal & ISK Target Tracker
description: Allow the pilot to set an ISK savings goal (e.g. save for a Rorqual, fund a doctrine ship) and track progress against current wallet balance and historical ISK flow. Shows projected time-to-goal based on recent earn rate.
notes: Set a named goal with a target ISK amount
Track current wallet balance vs. target — show progress bar and delta
Calculate average daily ISK income from wallet journal history
Project time-to-goal based on recent earn rate
Support multiple concurrent goals
Optional: alert when goal is reached

title: Build vs. Buy Advisor
description: A dedicated UI flow within the Blueprint Analyzer panel that automatically orchestrates blueprint checking, material cost appraisal, and market price comparison to produce a build vs. buy recommendation for any item or fit.
notes: Integrate into the existing Blueprint Analyzer panel as an additional mode
Blueprint check via query_industry to detect owned BPO/BPC and ME/TE
Material cost calculated via calculate_blueprint + appraise_items on inputs at Jita buy price
Market price via appraise_items on finished item at Jita sell price
Side-by-side comparison output: manufacture cost vs. buy cost, margin, and recommendation
Batch mode — process entire fits at once
Break-even ME calculator — show at what ME level manufacturing beats buying
Structure/rig toggle — factor in Raitaru, Azbel, Sotiyo bonuses vs. station

title: LP Store Optimizer
description: Ranks LP store redemption options by ISK/LP ratio across all of the pilot's LP wallets. Pulls public LP store offers via ESI (no auth required for store data), appraises outputs at Jita market prices, and calculates net ISK per LP spent to identify the best redemption targets.
notes: LP store offers endpoint is fully public — no auth scope needed, cache aggressively and keep local
Only auth required: esi-characters.read_loyalty.v1 for pilot LP balances
Cache LP store offer lists locally — they change infrequently, no need to hit ESI every load
Cross-reference with appraise_items / market data for sell price calculation
Sort output by ISK/LP ratio descending — highlight top 5 per store
SoE and Paragon stores likely highest value given pilot's current LP balances

title: Fix Toggle Full Screen Button
description: The toggle full screen button does not correctly switch the application to windowed mode. Clicking it keeps the app in full screen and the window cannot be resized.
notes: Button toggles visually but window remains full screen
Resize handles unavailable after toggle
Expected: clicking toggle exits full screen and restores resizable windowed mode

title: Agent Finder & Station Services Lookup
description: Allow pilots to search for NPC agents by corporation, division, level, and security status, and find nearest NPC stations by service type (clone bay, repair, reprocessing, factory, etc.) relative to current location or any named system. Data sourced from ESI and/or SDE static dump.
notes: ESI /agents/ endpoint — verify coverage; fallback to SDE agent table if incomplete
SDE staStations table includes service bitmask for clone bay, repair, factory, reprocessing, insurance, etc.
Filter agents by corporation, division, level, and security status
Filter stations by service type
Sort all results by jump distance from pilot's current location using plan_route
Surface closest + highest quality agent as primary result
Use cases: nearest Ministry of War agent, nearest clone bay to X system
Route integration — return jump count from origin system

title: SDE: Dogma Attributes & Effects
description: Integrate SDE dogma attributes and effects data — module effect formulas, stacking penalties, resist profiles — for more accurate fitting sim calculations including cap, resists, and damage.

title: SDE: NPC Agents
description: Integrate SDE NPC agent data — agent name, level, division, corporation, and station — to support the Agent Finder feature and serve as ESI fallback for agent lookups.

title: SDE: NPC Corporations & Factions
description: Integrate SDE NPC corporation and faction hierarchy data — home stations, standings effects, faction/corp relationships — to support standing loss/gain modelling and agent mission planning.

title: SDE: Certificate Tree
description: Integrate SDE certificate tree data — skill to role to certificate groupings — to power a skill recommendation engine supporting "what skills do I need for X role" queries.

title: SDE: Item Traits & Bonuses
description: Integrate SDE item traits and bonus data — ship role bonuses and trait descriptions — to display alongside fits in the fitting sim ship card.

title: SDE: Graphic & Render Metadata
description: Integrate SDE graphic and render metadata — 3D model references and icon IDs — to enable item icons and visual assets throughout the UI.

title: SDE: Wormhole Statics
description: Integrate SDE wormhole static data to build a suite of wormhole tools for pilots operating in or around J-space.
notes: Wormhole type lookup — pilot inputs hole ID (e.g. C247, K162) and gets full stats: class, static connections, mass limit, jump mass limit, lifetime, and wormhole effect
Intel Tool integration — when a WH system is identified, auto-display its class, statics, and effect alongside existing intel data
Mass calculator — given a ship or list of ships, calculate total mass and how many jumps remain before hole collapse based on hole mass limit

Mass-to-close calculator — determine what it would take to intentionally collapse the hole: account for jump drive mass (both directions count), ship hull mass, and number of entries needed to reach the total mass limit
Route planning excluded — static SDE data only; live hole locations would require ESI or manual pilot input and are out of scope

title: SDE: Sovereignty Structures
description: Integrate SDE sovereignty structure data — TCU and IHub data tied to systems — to support a sovereignty map feature.

title: SDE: Planetary Schematics
description: Integrate SDE planetary schematics — PI input/output chains, cycle times, and volumes — required for accurate PI Panel functionality. This data is essential and cannot be omitted from the PI feature.

title: SDE: Reaction Formulas
description: Integrate SDE reaction formula data — T2 and T3 reaction inputs and outputs — to support a reaction industry planning feature.

title: DUPLICATE — merged into Agent Finder & Station Services Lookup
description: Allow pilots to search for NPC agents by corporation, division, level, and security status. Show nearest agents to current location with jump count. Data likely available via the SDE static dump (agents table) even if not directly via ESI.
notes: Confirm whether ESI exposes agent data or if SDE-only
Filter by corp, division, level, sec status
Sort by distance/jumps from current location
Triggered by pilot asking for nearest Ministry of War agent

title: Nearest Station by Service Type
description: Allow pilots to query the nearest NPC station offering a specific service (clone bay, repair, reprocessing, factory, etc.) from their current location or any named system. Data available via SDE station tables which include service flags.
notes: SDE staStations table includes service bitmask
Services include: clone bay, repair, factory, reprocessing, insurance, etc.
Return nearest N stations with jump count and route option
Triggered by pilot asking for nearest clone bay to Yanuel

title: DUPLICATE — merged into Agent Finder & Station Services Lookup
description: Allow pilots to query NPC agents by corp/faction/level/type and find nearest stations by service type (clone bay, repair, reprocessing, etc.) relative to their current location or any named system. Data sourced from ESI and/or SDE static dump.
notes: ESI may expose agent data — verify endpoint coverage
SDE static dump has station service flags including clone bays
Use cases: nearest Ministry of War agent, nearest clone bay to X system
Route integration — return jump count from origin system

title: DUPLICATE — merged into Agent Finder & Station Services Lookup
description: Allow pilots to query for the nearest NPC station offering a specific service (clone bay, repair, reprocessing, etc.) from their current location or any given system. Data sourced from the SDE station tables which include service flags.
notes: SDE station tables include service flags for clone bay, repair, factory, etc.
Could also fold in agent finder since same data source
Useful for null/low-sec pilots finding nearest highsec services

title: Invention Planner
description: An invention planning tool integrated into the Blueprint Planner. Helps capsuleers plan T2 invention runs by analysing available decryptors and recommending the optimal one based on desired outcome (ME, TE, run count, probability).
notes: Lives inside the Blueprint Planner UI
Suggests the best decryptor to use from the pilot's current inventory
Should factor in decryptor cost vs. outcome value (probability bonus, ME/TE/runs on resulting BPC)
Compare all applicable decryptors side-by-side including no-decryptor baseline

title: Changelog Popup on App Update
description: Display a changelog popup to the pilot when the app updates to a new version, summarising what's new, changed, or fixed since their last session.
notes: Detect version change on load (compare stored version vs current)
Fetch or embed changelog content per version
Display modal/popup with structured list of changes (new features, bug fixes, improvements)
Option to dismiss and not show again for that version
Consider linking to full roadmap or patch notes from within the popup

title: Import fit from Fit Analyzer into Blueprint Planner
description: Allow pilots to import a ship fit directly from the Fit Analyzer into the Blueprint Planner, automatically resolving the full build tree — hull, modules, rigs, charges, and drones — into their corresponding blueprints and material requirements for a one-click production plan.
notes: Resolve each fit item to its blueprint (hull + all modules, rigs, ammo, drones)
Support nested builds (e.g. T2 modules that themselves require component BPs)
Show aggregated material list across all blueprints in the fit
Flag any missing blueprints in the pilot's inventory
Option to queue all resolved jobs directly from the import view

title: Asset Value Tracker
description: Track total asset value across all locations over time, giving pilots a portfolio-style view of their net worth in EVE. Allows comparison against previous snapshots to see growth or loss.
notes: Requested by Holzer
Snapshots total estimated asset value (Jita appraisal basis)
Historical tracking — show value over time
Flex on your haters

title: Character Intel Lookup
description: Allow pilots to look up any EVE character by name directly from the intel feed or chat. Returns corp, alliance, security status, kill/loss history, typical ships flown, and threat assessment.
notes: Integrate zKillboard API for kill/loss history and ship preferences
ESI lookup for corp, alliance, security status, age
Threat scoring based on killboard activity
Trigger from intel feed pilot names directly
